headline: Barclays Lifts PT on ConocoPhillips (COP) to $128 From $118 – Here’s Why
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is one of the best oil stocks to buy right now. On March 13, Barclays lifted the price target on ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) to $128 from $118 and reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares, lifting 2026 oil price estimates on the Iran war. ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) also received a rating update from Piper Sandler on […]

headline: ConocoPhillips Insider Sales Stir Questions On Capital Returns And Outlook
summary: Senior ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) executives, including VP & Controller Kontessa S. Haynes Welsh and SVP & General Counsel Rose Kelly Brunetti, recently reported fresh insider stock sales. These transactions follow an earlier director sale and add new information about insider behavior during an active period of portfolio reshaping for the company. The cluster of executive-level sales is drawing investor attention to questions around board sentiment, capital allocation priorities, and...

headline: Trump weighing options to strike Iran's critical oil hub, UN Ambassador Waltz says
summary: Israel says it has killed two senior Iranian intelligence officials as oil loading reportedly resumes in the UAE's Fujairah port following a fire.

headline: Price caps, taking the stairs, and short-sleeved shirts: How countries are coping with the Iran war energy shock
summary: Some countries have imposed price caps and released oil stockpiles to maintain energy supplies, while others are trying to reduce consumption.

headline: Oil loading operations at UAE's Fujairah have resumed: media reports
summary: The fire in Fujairah, caused by debris from an intercepted drone, had disrupted operations in a key crude oil loading port in the Gulf.

headline: ConocoPhillips (COP) Price Target Increased to $154 at Piper Sandler
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is included among the 12 Best Large Cap Energy Stocks to Buy Now.
